1_Creating_a_Layer: 3. Replace @name with your layer name (lowercase, hyphens for spaces)
5. Add CSS in the css block
6. Add HTML in the html block if needed
7. Add JavaScript in the init block if needed
8. Add to Config/site-config.json in the 'layers' array
2_Creating_a_Section: 5. Add CSS in the css block if needed
6. Add JavaScript in the javascript block if needed
7. Add initialization code in the init block if needed
8. Add to Config/site-config.json in the 'sections' array
3_Important_Notes: - Filename must match the @name field: my-layer → my-layer.exwl3
- Each name must be unique across all mods
- Use lowercase names with hyphens: my-layer, my-section
- All blocks must end with closing brace: }
- Always update Config/site-config.json after creating new mods
- Blocks can be omitted if you don't need them
4_File_Format: - Code blocks use: css { }, html target { }, javascript { }, init { }
- Text format, not JSON - proper braces matter!
6_Accessing_the_Kernel: In init blocks, the kernel context is available
For debugging: window.__exw3_kernel in browser console
